scripts.dev:react:brand-2: pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/components build && pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/react-wrapper build && pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/react-showcase dev
scripts.dev:react:custom: pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/components build && pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/react-wrapper build && pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/react-custom-demo dev
scripts.dev:angular:brand-1: pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/components build && pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/angular-wrapper build && pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/angular-showcase start
scripts.dev:angular:custom: pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/components build && pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/angular-wrapper build && pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/angular-custom-demo start
scripts.storybook:build: pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/components build && pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/react-wrapper build && pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/angular-wrapper build && pnpm --recursive --if-present build-storybook
scripts.storybook:dev:react: pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/components build && pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/react-wrapper build && pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/react-showcase storybook
scripts.storybook:dev:angular: pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/components build && pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/angular-wrapper build && pnpm --filter @fuggetlenfe/angular-showcase storybook
